source_meta.source_document: Restoration Modular Revision Hip System Surgical Protocol

TRAYS.Tray Notes: Official Stryker materials describe fewer trays and streamlined revision instrumentation for the Restoration Modular system.

COMPONENTS.Component Notes: Official surgical protocol describes modular cone bodies in seven diameters with multiple vertical offsets.
Official surgical protocol describes conical distal stems in multiple lengths and diameters.
Official surgical protocol states the cone bodies are compatible with CoCr, Biolox delta ceramic, and alumina ceramic femoral heads.

row.system_notes: Modular revision total hip arthroplasty platform for complex femoral revision and severe bone loss.
